objective: Cycle 96 — C126: SceneManager visibilitychange RAF pause + CardOverlay flip timeout dedup

bugs_fixed: C126/VIS-01 (MEDIUM): SceneManager had no visibilitychange guard — RAF loop continued at ~4fps on hidden tabs, burning GPU/CPU on every run for the full session duration. Fix: added `onVisibilityChange` handler in constructor (stop on hidden, start on visible). Added `running` boolean guard on `start()` to prevent double-loop from rapid visibility events. Removed in dispose(). Affects every play session whenever player switches tabs.

C126/FLIP-01 (LOW): triggerFlipAnimation() queued a new 420ms setTimeout every showCard() call with no cleanup of the previous one. On rapid card succession (e.g. empty-options guard resolve → next card in <420ms), N timeouts accumulate each trying to remove 'card-flip'. Fix: module-level flipTimeoutId, clearTimeout before each new setTimeout. Cosmetic but prevents timer accumulation over long runs.
audit_summary.c126_verdict: CLEAR — RAF pauses on tab hide. Flip timeouts deduplicated. 0 TS errors.
c126_confirmations: SceneManager.ts: onVisibilityChange registered + removed in dispose(); running guard on start()
CardOverlay.ts: flipTimeoutId module-level, clearTimeout before new flip setTimeout
GLB flatShading audit: cauldron/bougie set inline ✓, table/biblio/sol_pierre via applyFlatShading() ✓, mur_pierre inline ✓, crystal_ball intentionally no flatShading (glass aesthetic)
Build: main=52.10KB gzip (+0.11KB), minigames=25.45KB gzip. 0 TS errors.
